arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal & Chelsea battle Real Madrid for potential €45m wonderkid transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are among the latest clubs to show a strong interest in the potential transfer of River Plate wonderkid Franco Mastantuono. The 17-year-old attacking midfielder is regarded as one of the most exciting young talents in South America at the moment, with a host of top European clubs scouting him, CaughtOffside understands. It […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal & Chelsea battle Real Madrid for potential €45m wonderkid transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea injuries, Carabao Cup importance, Mykhailo Mudryk chance
arts.sum: I said many times, the only thing we need to pay attention to is how we can improve and I think we are progressing, we are in the right direction but we just started two months ago. The Blues head coach, 48 hours after his side's win against West Ham United in the Premier League, previewed his team's cup tie with his players in strong form.

arts.ttl: Malo Gusto and Romeo Lavia injury update as Enzo Maresca offers fresh Chelsea boost
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has been forced to deal with several injury concerns in the early weeks of the season, including club captain Reece James as well as Malo Gusto and Romeo Lavia. Maresca confirmed that Gusto is in line to return following the injury, while Lavia remains sidelined for the time being.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make Nicolas Jackson decision as major transfer change expected
arts.sum: The striker has scored four times in five Premier League games so far this season, but reports claim that Chelsea still have a four-man shortlist to add to their striking options. FL says : Jackson’s form and performances so far this season means that Chelsea are no longer in desperate need for a striker; there could however be a problem if the 23-year-old picked up an injury.

The victory meant Maresca became the first manager since Pep Guardiola in 2016 to win his first three Premier League away games at a new club. CM: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall - Maresca's go-to man in the East Midlands is a sure bet to come into the team having been limited to cameo appearances in the Premier League thus far.

arts.ttl: Unwanted Chelsea star to make surprise return in Carabao Cup with Enzo Maresca 'hopeful'
arts.sum: Chelsea were looking to push England international Ben Chilwell through the exit door in the summer but he is now set to play some minutes in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Maresca confirms exiled player to return in EFL Cup against Barrow
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has confirmed that Chelsea left-back Ben Chilwell is set to return to the squad for the Blues EFL Cup match against League Two leaders Barrow on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea legend makes Jadon Sancho feelings clear with comment that speak volumes
arts.sum: Joe Cole believes on-loan Manchester United winger could be a missing ingredient for the Blues but he has to start delivering on a consistent basis in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Arsenal could play 16-year-old goalkeeper Jack Porter against Bolton with David Raya likely to be rested after picking up a knock at Man City and Pedro Neto cup tied
arts.sum: Arsenal could be forced to play 16-year-old rookie goalkeeper Jack Porter after David Raya limped off in Sunday's enthralling 2-2 draw against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Ben Chilwell set for Chelsea comeback in Carabao Cup tie against Barrow
arts.sum: The England international has not featured for the Blues since April.
